content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

One issue found: the working-tree snapshot artifact at `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` still includes removed final-review planner data (`final_review_planner`), while implementation paths currently write only reviewer + arbiter fields. Update the fixture run artifact accordingly.

## Amendments

1. High: `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json:33-36` (`active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot`) still serializes `final_review_planner`, but the current final-review stage snapshot schema is only `final_review_reviewers` and `final_review_arbiter` (`src/contexts/project_run_record/model.rs:203-206`) and `build_final_review_snapshot` emits only those fields (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:8206-8222`). This reintroduces a removed planner field into a new tracked `run.json` artifact and violates the no-planner final-review snapshot contract.
   Rationale: Confidence: high. The checked-in run snapshot now drifts from active runtime schema/persistence behavior and can misrepresent intended stage-resolution persistence after this flow change.
